name: UNITED THERAPEUTICS Corp
summary: PART I Overview Founded by our Chairperson and Chief Executive Officer, Martine Rothblatt, to find a cure for her daughters life-threatening rare disease, pulmonary arterial hypertension ( PAH ), United Therapeutics advances therapies for people living with serious diseases with unmet medical needs. Our mission is to transform the treatment of rare diseases and expand the availability of transplantable organs through innovative organ manufacturing technologies.
